Specification
Objective: Fix the alignment and positioning of the "Back" button on the Auth Page (Sign In/Sign Up) specifically for web view (desktop) while preserving the design.
Problem: The button uses absolute positioning which might be visually tight to the edge (top-4 left-4) on larger screens, or misaligned internally (icon vs text).
Solution:
Change positioning from absolute to fixed to ensure it is always anchored to the viewport corner, regardless of the container's layout context.
Implement responsive spacing: Keep top-4 left-4 for mobile, but increase to top-6 left-6 for larger screens (sm: breakpoint) to give it proper "breathing room" in web view.
Refine internal alignment: Add leading-none and a slight top padding (pt-0.5) to the text span to optically align it perfectly with the center of the icon.
